name: Dog In Sock
description: Why Dog in Sock? In a world of complicated tokenomics and stressful charts, Dog in Sock is your cozy escape. We're building a lifestyle brand around the simple joy of a tiny Shiba snuggled up in a warm sock. No promises. No pressure. Just a community of people who love comfort, cuteness, and wearing something that makes the world smile. From tees to hoodies to socks (obviously), we're turning a meme into a movement. Growing 🌱 Community Diamond 💎 Holders 100% Cozy Level
